feed.subtitle: Latest gigs and events in Oslo, Norway
feed.title: Oslo Gig Guide

entry.content:
Venue: KAFÉ HÆRVERK
Start: 2026-04-10 23:00
Tags: house, techno, disco


Mungolian Jetset DJs spiller elektronisk i alle former og fasonger. Forvent House, techno, disco, acid, elektro og psykedelisk !

CC: 120,- ID : 20


Tickets:
entry.summary: Mungolian Jetset DJ SET at KAFÉ HÆRVERK on 2026-04-10 23:00
entry.title: Mungolian Jetset DJ SET (2026-04-10)
